failures.description: The agent failed by planning and executing the catalog search with available_only=false even though the user explicitly asked for the cheapest available Vacuum Cleaner.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Vacuum Cleaner. The agent understood the product type and price sorting objective, but at index 1 it planned a ProductCatalogSearch call with available_only=false. The required constraint 'available' was already present in the user request, so the correct action should have filtered to available items only. This is a deviation from the required tool-call plan despite having enough information. The later answer happened to select an available item, but the incorrect search constraint was never corrected.
